text.tspan: Kindly ensure each time this ID is presented, that you verify the credentials
The details on the front of this NIN slip must EXACT
Ift his NIN was not issued to the person on the front of this document, please Do
attempt to scan, photocopy or replicate the personal data contained herein.
ou are only permitted to scan the barcode for the purpose of identity verification.
if you accept any variance on the scan result or do not scan 2D barcode overleaf.
